data.four_set_effect: After defeating an opponent, increases Charged Attack DMG by 50%, and reduces its Stamina cost to 0 for 10s.

circlet_of_logos.desc: The iron mask the knight used to conceal their identity. Many have speculated about the face behind the mask.
circlet_of_logos.title: Bloodstained Iron Mask

flower_of_life.desc: A dried flower stained black with blood and now as hard as steel. Probably some sort of a memento for its former master.
flower_of_life.title: Bloodstained Flower of Iron

goblet_of_eonothem.desc: The dark metallic vessel owned by the Bloodstained Knight. Its exterior has been stained as black as the night by smoke and coagulated blood.
goblet_of_eonothem.title: Bloodstained Chevalier's Goblet

plume_of_death.desc: A raven feather pinned to a knight's cape. Countless bloodstains have dyed it pitch black.
plume_of_death.title: Bloodstained Black Plume

sands_of_eon.desc: A timepiece once used by a knight. The liquid inside has dried up, rendering it useless.
sands_of_eon.title: Bloodstained Final Hour

list.desc: A common white flower given to the knight by a rescued damsel.</br>It is dried and hardened by the blood from all his bloodshed.</br>Thanking him for his valor, the damsel offered a reward.</br>He turned down all she gave, save for a pure white flower.</br>"For a knight, chivalry is its own reward."</br>"This flower shall be my medal. That is all I need."</br>He wore the flower upon his heart.</br>Like his armor, it was stained as black as a winter's night.</br>Like his heart, it was hardened like a tempered blade.</br>
list.title: Bloodstained Flower of Iron

list.desc: A luxurious platinum mask that once belonged to a knight of noble birth.</br>The dark stains of dry blood are now a permanent part of its appearance.</br>As the Bloodstained Knight reached out to help a person in need after slaying the monster,</br>The way she cowered in fear made the knight realize:</br>He was now a monster himself.</br>Tainted by the blood and cruelty of his drawn-out war.</br>"Shield me from the eyes"</br>"Of those I vowed to protect."</br>"And shield them from the horrors I am bound to effect."</br>
list.title: Bloodstained Iron Mask

list.desc: Originally an exquisite silver goblet with gold engravings depicting the feats of a chivalrous knight.</br>But blood and smoke have stained the cup beyond recognition.</br>Covered in blood, the knight who slayed demons returned from the scourged battlefield,</br>Only to find that those awaiting his rescue were nowhere to be found among the burning, collapsed houses.</br>Defeated, the Bloodstained Knight took the smoke-blackened goblet,</br>and vowed to rid the world of monsters, of poverty and of evil.</br>
list.title: Bloodstained Chevalier's Goblet

list.desc: One of the countless raven feathers stuck to the Bloodstained Knight.</br>For where there is blood, ravens shall follow.</br>In the end the Bloodstained Knight could no longer tell</br>whether the blood that stained him was his own or that of his enemies.</br>Eventually, on his long journey filled with bloodshed, he came to a realization:</br>His path of so-called chivalry had turned him from the white knight he used to be into the monster he had now become.</br>His only followers were the ravens drawn to the bloodshed he left in his wake.</br>
list.title: Bloodstained Black Plume

list.desc: Deep in the abyss, where celestial bodies cast no light,</br>the Bloodstained Knight kept this timepiece, though time had lost all meaning.</br>At an end was the Bloodstained Knight's story,</br>for he realized there was no place for him on this earth.</br>He ventured into the fallen ancient kingdom, and died in battle in the monsters' lair.</br>At the bottom of the world, he learned the origin of the monsters that destroyed the ancient kingdom.</br>"The ancient kingdom was wrongfully cursed,"</br>"Turning its inhabitants into monsters."</br>"The code of chivalry tolerates not such injustice."</br>"If Abyss be thy name, I pledge to you my loyalty."</br>
list.title: Bloodstained Final Hour
